title: lotus micranthus
intro: Lotus micranthus, also known as the small-leaf lotus, is a plant species belonging to the family Nelumbonaceae. This aquatic plant has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antibacterial, and antiviral activities. The health benefits of lotus micranthus include reducing fever, alleviating respiratory issues, and supporting digestive health, as well as exhibiting potential anti-cancer properties. Lotus micranthus is typically used in herbal preparations such as teas, infusions, and tinctures, although further research is needed to confirm its full range of benefits and applications.
